prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-TTAHW6CRC-7PC-MED-BL-BUN Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 7pc Die Cast Toy Vehicles Semi Truck Toy Car Carrier, Diecast Playset for Boys 3 and Up Description: Calling all little ones with a need for speed.

This awesome Kidplokio 7pc Semi Truck Toy Vehicle Transporter Playset comes with 6 diecast toy cars that can be easily tucked away into the sides of a larger semi truck transporter toy, making this a super fun 2-in-1 toy set. The larger semi-truck toy features two plastic snap-closure sidings to ensure all the toy cars stay together after playtime and don’t get lost.

The semi-hauler toy truck with toy cars is constructed of heavy-duty, durable plastic, meaning it can stand up to lots of everyday playtime wear and tear whether at home, traveling, or out at play dates. In addition, playing with a manual truck toy can also help your little one use their imagination, encourage exploration and creativity, sharpen their fine motor skills, and teach them to share with siblings, friends, and schoolmates too.

With the toy truck's clever design and easy travel portability, hours of fun playtime for little ones and their friends or siblings await. No batteries or assembly is required here, so your child can have fun right out of the box.

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts)

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: toy truck car carrier auto hauler playset for boys ages 3-13 playmat indoor creativity pretend play holiday toy list stocking stuffer for boys Features: - DIECAST TOY VEHICLE TRUCK CARRIER: This awesome toy truck comes with 6 diecast cars that can be tucked away into the sides of the semi-truck transporter toy; The semi truck toy features two plastic snap closure sidings to ensure all the pieces stay together after playtime - ENCOURAGES CREATIVITY AND IMAGINATION: With so many playing options available, kids will have hours of pretend play fun racing cars and driving the large semi-truck toy on its own; this playset is also great for cognitive development as kids think up lots of pretend play scenarios, while also working their fine motor skills - TRAVEL FRIENDLY TOY CARRIER: The truck toy is constructed of durable plastic, meaning it can stand up to lots of wear and tear in the playroom! The sturdy plastic side snap closures and retractable carrier handle make this a great toy to travel with keeping all the components safe and secure - HOURS OF ENTERTAINMENT FOR KIDS: Made of durable plastic and diecast, the semi-truck toy carrier is safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision; Can be wiped down and left to air dry in between uses as needed - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 14 x 7 x 5 inches; Color: Blue or Red; Weight: 1.06lbs; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Recommended ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio 7pc Blue Semi Truck Toy Car Carrier
